task: Clerk Billing UI slice — custom pricing/checkout/billing routes + studio enforcement UI
scope_note: Backend is complete and verified. Both Basic and Pro grant all capabilities — NO <Show> gates needed. Only volume gates (product count, monthly credits).

stories.title: Build /pricing route with custom Mantine plan cards (usePlans)
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/pricing.tsx exists and registers via createFileRoute
src/components/billing/PricingPage.tsx renders plans fetched via usePlans({ for: 'user' }) from @clerk/react/experimental
Shows Mantine SimpleGrid of plan cards with name, monthly/annual price, feature list, and a Subscribe CTA
Monthly/annual toggle (Mantine SegmentedControl) affects displayed price
Current plan highlighted with a badge when user has one
Subscribe CTA routes to /checkout?planId=<id>&period=<month|annual>
Imports from @clerk/react/experimental live only in src/components/billing/**
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Build /checkout route with CheckoutProvider + custom form
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/checkout.tsx exists, reads planId and period from search params
src/components/billing/CheckoutForm.tsx wraps <CheckoutProvider> and uses useCheckout + usePaymentElement
src/lib/billing/stripeAppearance.ts exports stripeAppearance(theme) mapping Mantine tokens to Stripe Elements appearance
Order summary shows plan name + price + period
Submit flow: submit() → checkout.confirm(data) → triggers post-checkout interstitial before finalize() navigates
Errors surface via Mantine Alert, disabled state during submit
Clerk experimental imports confined to src/components/billing/**
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Post-checkout interstitial component + polling
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/billing/PostCheckoutInterstitial.tsx exists
On mount: calls clerk.session?.reload() then calls syncUserPlan action, then polls getBillingStatus every ~500ms
When getBillingStatus returns a non-empty plan, dismiss and navigate to /studio
10-second timeout shows 'Still activating — try refreshing' with a retry button (window.location.reload)
Integrated into CheckoutForm so it appears between confirm() and finalize navigation
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Onboarding redirect for unsubscribed users
acceptanceCriteria: When an authenticated user's userPlans.plan is empty or missing, they are redirected to /pricing from any protected route
Redirect is implemented without a flash of protected content (gate on data ready, don't render children until we know)
Logic lives in src/components/billing/SubscriptionRequired.tsx and wraps protected routes
Studio routes (/studio, /studio/$productId) are wrapped
/pricing, /checkout, /account/billing and public routes (home, sign-in) are NOT wrapped (no infinite redirect)
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Build /account/billing route with current subscription + manage actions
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/account.billing.tsx (or src/routes/account/billing.tsx — match TanStack Start file-based routing) exists
src/components/billing/CurrentSubscriptionCard.tsx displays current plan name, period, next renewal date
Cancel subscription action uses CheckoutProvider/Clerk experimental hook (or clerk.billing.cancelSubscriptionItem via a Convex action) with a Mantine confirmation modal
Change plan link routes to /pricing
Handles the no-subscription case (shouldn't normally happen — redirect to /pricing)
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: CreditsIndicator component in studio header
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/billing/CreditsIndicator.tsx exists
Reads api.billing.syncPlan.getBillingStatus (or equivalent status query — verify actual exported name)
Shows 'N/M credits this month' with 'resets on [date]'
Visible in studio.index and studio.$productId headers
Warning style when credits <= 10% remaining
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Over-limit banners + disabled generation when credits exhausted
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/studio.index.tsx and studio.$productId.tsx import getBillingStatus
When creditsUsed >= creditsTotal, render a Mantine Alert banner: 'You have used all N credits for this month. They reset on DATE.'
Generation-triggering buttons (Generate, Submit, Retry, Remove Background) are disabled while over-limit
An 'Upgrade to Pro' link in the banner routes to /pricing
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Product-count indicator with at-limit state
acceptanceCriteria: studio.index shows 'N/M products' indicator (via getBillingStatus)
When productCount >= productLimit, 'New Product' button disabled and a Mantine Alert appears: 'You have N products but your plan allows M. Archive products or upgrade.'
Upgrade link routes to /pricing
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: Nav links + __root.tsx updates
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/__root.tsx shows 'Pricing' NavLink between Home and Studio when authenticated (still visible to unauthenticated too so they can see pricing)
Mobile drawer has matching MobileNavLink
A 'Billing' link to /account/billing is in the nav or UserButton panel for signed-in users
pnpm build compiles green

stories.title: CI fence: ensure @clerk/react/experimental imports stay inside src/components/billing/**
acceptanceCriteria: A simple grep-based check (either in package.json or documented in a CI script) fails when any file outside src/components/billing/** imports from '@clerk/react/experimental'
Current codebase passes the check

stories.title: Final architect verification
acceptanceCriteria: Architect agent reviews the full UI slice against these acceptance criteria
pnpm build green
All prior stories' criteria met
Architect verdict: PROCEED or PROCEED WITH REFINEMENTS (not BLOCK)

session_summary: UI slice start. Backend complete (commit 30afad3). 11 stories covering pricing/checkout/billing routes + studio enforcement UI. No <Show> gates per user clarification.
